canonical_definition: The task of distinguishing between highly similar actions within a specific domain, requiring attention to subtle differences in movement, posture, and interaction with the environment.
papers: ActionAtlas: A VideoQA Benchmark for Domain-specialized Action Recognition
TOPA: Extending Large Language Models for Video Understanding via Text-Only Pre-Alignment
